TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Canada, title = Canada, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Canada} }

S.FORM: Canada hya' ga cyux maki' tay 60 00 N, 95 00 W na pemeco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 9,984,670 sq km (maki' tay 2ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 9,093,507 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 891,163 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 35,362,905. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 6.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 34.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 59.10% spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ottawa. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Charles III. mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. lalu kkyalan Canada hya ga minkahun naha kay nqu zik na聖羅倫斯易洛魁語 Kanata一詞,imi nya ga qalang ru ini ga rhyal nqu linhuyan naha maki.Maki squ 1535 kawas,misuw qani ga nyux ki'an nqu 'tayal nqu 魁北克市nyux naha mosa rasun qu qutux kahul Kokka nqu法國pyang musa smehang kkongun na yuwaw雅克·卡蒂亞nyux naha rasun te斯塔達科納,ana yaqu rhyal qasa lga sllwan naha maha Kanata la.babaw nqu 雅克·卡蒂亞qaniy lga si'naha say maha Canada imi nya ga 多納科納(pgleng na即斯塔達科納) nyux klhang nqu rhyal.maki squ 1545 kawas,biru nqu Kokka na歐洲ru biru na rhyal kktan 'osa Kokka ga nyux naha 'ringun qu Kokka na Canada qani maha rhyal qani qu mwah rahyuw squ rhyal qani.qsu balay hga maki 17 seci ki 18 seci,sun na Canada qu 新法蘭西na llyung rhyal 聖羅倫斯.nanu saga nyux naha spgluw squ mopuw cyugal kinlhangan na squliq ki rhyal yuwaw hmtuy squ Kokka na英,Sexu na英國maki squ 1774 kawas pkita kmal squ horit na魁北克,taqu horit qani ga nyux pshgci squ kki'an nqu Canada tehok squ zmal krahu nqu languw maki squ rhyal na mkura kilux qasa,kintwahiq nqu llyang na 俄亥俄.Kwara qu rhyal qni ga maki squ 1783 kawas lga wayal naha pskura 'myuw miq squ giqas na Kokka na Amirika la,ana ga zmal nqu languw krahu nqu rhyal te mkura tltu qasa ga,mucing soni nqu 安大略 Sng ka kwara rhyal nyux qrqan nqu Kokka na英國. babaw na qnolan nqu Kokka 英國squ 法蘭西,Kokka nqu Canada lga m'sazing qu qinsugal la,qsugun maha tekraya Canada ru te kyahu Canada la.maki squ 1841kawas,taqu tekraya Canada ru te kyahu Canada lga msqum lozi ru m'Canada Sng la. maki squ 1867 kawas,Canada Sng ki 新布藍茲維ru新斯科細亞ps'rux squ sinqunan naha mlahang nanak squ Canada.gmluw squ Canada n_gyut mshriq kinlahang nqu Kokka英國,ana naha Sexu ga n_giyut gmluw maki squ biru na tthoki ru pinkyalan naha squ gaga ka skayal naha maha Canada.maki squ 1982 kawas lalu nqu smqqas squ ryax sqasan Kokka na Canada aring sun naha maha,naha nanak gmleng maras squ ryax ru wayal naha zyugum maha ryax na Canada. zuaw nqu kinraral ziraynqu ''tayal skahul squ minkingkyuw naha zyuwaw na kinraral ru pinbcywan naha mqbaq ulah nqu squliq,ana balay cikuy ga pkai qu zik na 24, 500 kawas 育空mkura tltu qasa lga rima maki qu squliq cyux myuwi kya la,squliq myuwi maki squ 安大略 mkura kilux baqun mhyuwaw mita squ zik kung yan7,500 kawas.be'nux rhyal na舊克羅ki藍魚洞穴ga snbil naha zyuwaw minnaki squ zik na Canada spyang binkesan rhyal kni'an nqu squliq.spyang baqun maha syaki nqu tayal ga maki qu rhyal b'syqan naha maki,muhi squ rrhyal,m'ubu' nqu syakay ka pinbcyuan ru wanglu na zyuwaw htgan pila.Kya kruma minnqwas na 'tayal hya ga maki squ cinhkan kinlhang na Kokka 歐洲lga zik na ptehuk squ Canada ga wayal rima mshgah la,misuw qani ga siki spwah squ kilnyuhan naha kingkyuw zyuwaw na sraral musa mita squ kilbaqan naha. maki squ tequtux nazyuwaw kinlhang Kokka na 歐洲qu squliq mnki squ Canada ga,kwara ka linpgan kihmayan nqu squliq ga wayal squ 20 mang tehuk 200 mang.gluw nqu mrhuw na Canada ka skahun squ lihoyan na sqblaq hi nqu 'tayal mita,misuw qani ga kya wayal squ 50 mang squliq minnaki rhyal nqu Canada qani.Yalaw gi ungat qu sintnaqan na squ blq ramu nya,taqu 'tayal sqani ga wahan qmyu m'atu nqu kinlhangan na squliq,bgasiq,'nbu kbakih lamu na 'nbu qmyu,wal si pskongat qu squliq nya 40% tehuk squ80%.misuw 'tayal nyux maki squ Canada qani ga tequtux nqu minruk,因努伊特人ki梅蒂人,zik qani ga 'tayal nqu梅蒂hya ga 'tayal ki kinbahan Kokka na 法 wayal 'mimaw ki Canada ru m' kinbahan na Canada la .pspngun ki binah na 'tayal ga,yalaw gi ini pyang psaywah qu squliq na努伊特ki squliq na kinlhangan Kokka na歐洲. sinnhyan horitgaga nqu Canada hya ga maki inu klhang naha zqu Zizyuw na smnhyan,ksxun naha qu lmau na gaga ru klahang qu ana ini ptnaq na sinnhyan ga Zizyuw naha. kahun squ knita naha te 2011kawas hmkangi baq squ ssquliq,Kokka na Canada ga maki 67.3% qu ssquliq smnhi squ Kiristokyo(lpgun uzi qu giqas na Kyokay,Tinskyo)maki squ smnhi Kiristokyo qani ga Tinskyo qu spyang krahu na ubuy nqu smnhi,taqu squliq smnhi squ Tinskyo ga kya waayl tehuk squ 38.7%.sinqunan linhoyan kwara nqu Kyokay Canada ga(maha ni mopuw ga mpitu qu cyoro kyokay na Canada ki binah na kyokay yannqu 衛理公會na Canada,公理會na Canada pinsqunan nqu kyokay .)maki squ rhyal qani ga spyang krahu ubuy nqu giqas kyokay,kinhmayan nqu ssquliq nya ga wal squ 6.1%,ru babaw nya lga kyokay nqu聖公Canada lga (5.0%)ki kyo kay na浸信(1.9%).ru maki qu kya wal squ 23.9％ nqu ssquliq ga ini snhi squ sinnhyan.binha na sinnhyan hya ga 伊斯蘭教(3.2%),印度教(1.7%),錫克教(1.4%),佛教(1.3%)ki猶太教(1.2%),kwara ka smnhi na ssquliq ga wal mtbuci squpin cikay. ppsbaq ppsbaq nqu Canada hya ga kahul naha squ qutux qutux na rrhyal tbuci mtyuwaw lmahang.5 kawas tehuk 7 kawas ru 16 kawas tehuk squ 18kawas qani hya ga qinhlan nqu Kokka na Canada siki mqwas squ biru kwara,ini khzi taqu baq mita squ bnrwan na ssquliq hya ga wayal squ 99％. mucing squ 2011 kawas,maki te 25kawas tehuk squ 64 kawas nqu mebnkis hayhazi hya ga kyawayal squ 88%nqu ssquliq wayal magal squ pinwasan na kawcung pinqbaq biru,pspngu squ sinqunan mtyuwaw ggwahan squ pila ki piaqunan lihuyan squ pphtuw nqu kinbaqan ga (74%)kinwagiq.2002 kawas,maki squ 25kawas tehuk squ 64 kawas na ssquliq Canada ga kya wayal squ 43% nqu ssquliq ga wayal magal squ krahu na pinqwasan biru,ana ga mki squ 25kawas tehuk squ 34 kawas na ssquliq hya ga kyawal squ 51% na ssquliq ga maki kwara qu biru pinwasan naha squ krahu na pinqwasan la. skahul naha squ Kokka kungsi pkayal te razyuw mita maha maki squ bnrwan naha te 2012 kawas,maki squ babaw cinbwanan qani ga spyang krahu qu ppsbaq ru pinwasan na Kokka Canada hya.pinhtgan Knita naha squ cipuqing Kwara ka Kokka na mqwas biru ga mqwas biru nqu Canada hya ga maki qu kinbaqan naha hminas kinwagiq nqu sinqunan mtyuwaw squ hhtgan na pila qu kinbaqan naha,hminas spyang mki squ llpgal,smsun kinmhgan zezyaw qinbaqan na,pbku llamu qinbaqan qinnxan ru kahul squ kinnita naha bbiru musa smbuci kbalay squ haylaw baqun mita nqu mqbaq na squliq. kbalay squ biru na gaga spyang kin binkgan:gagan qu Canada ru ryax krahu na Canada kinbalay naqu湯姆 'rtung abaw na qparung mkura tltu,cyux skun squ kki'an 美術Kokka na Canada, nyux ki'an cingay balay nqu minruk Kokka na Canada qani,cingay qu minruk nya ru ana naha gaga uzi lga wayal mhhuluy cikay ru cingay qu lllamu nqu gaga naha uzi,taqu lllamu nqu gaga naha qani ga nyux klmang nqu horit.maki squ qalang na 魁北克,taqu squliq na魁北克qani ga krahu balay qu kinta naha squ lalu naha nanak,ru gaga nqu魁北克ki Kokka nqu英式na gaga Canada ga maki balay qu ini btnaq.kahul squ kara nqu Kokka mwah mita ga,m'gaga nqu 馬賽克qu Canada qani——yalaw gi gaga nqu Canada qani ga minkahul squ ini ptnaq nqu rrhyal,ru sinqunan nqu squliq na tayal ka ini ptnaq nqu gaga ssquliq.taqu gaga nqu Sexu mosa glgan hya ga,yan nqu sinqunan ppkita squ ''nbu,laxan qu gaga horit maha phuqil hya,kinrrngu puyut squ mqzinut,smrrhuw qmhut lmahang squ ppatus ki ptgyah smwal squ kneril ki kneril mlikuy ki mlikuy ga nway msqum ru qutux nqu mwah kbalay squ inkyasan na gaga Canada. minnaki squ yuwaw kinraral kinlhang nqu rhyal na Kokka 英ki Kokka 法,wayal msbah cikay qu gaga na Canada gi 'mimaw cikay squ rusa Kokka ki gaga nqu 'tayal sqani.taqu kay nqu 'tayal sqani,taqu kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux ni tayal ru hngiyang lubuwn qani ga hmluy squ kinnita naha nanak squ lalu naha ka Canada.cingay squliq nqu Canada ga kinmopuw naha krahu mita squ llamu na gaga,knita naha squ llamu na gaga qani ga krangi naha qutux qbci nqu Kokka mita.zyuwaw nqu gnogan na Kokka Amirika ru sinbung ka maki squ yal Kokka na英maki squ zik na gaga Canada ga soyal naha balay,ana ga trang naha soyal uzi qu gaga nqu qeqaya Canada ki spyang maki squ kktan ta squ teribiy ru ega maki squ Amirika ki babaw cinbwanan ana inu nqu rrhyal ga soyal naha balay.ana yaqu gaga nqu kinlhangan ga soyal na Sexu na,horit ki pkayal squ kosiy na Canada,syun naha inlungan qu ega kyuk nqu Kokka na Canada ru razyuw pkayal squ yuwaw na teribi ru yal nqu kkyal nqu linhoyan wi'ing ka kwara ki'an i ppcywagu. skahul naha squ kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux ni tayal Canada kinitanaha squ kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux musa magal squ sekow spyang karahu,mi'a su nqu 湯姆·湯姆遜——hya ga maki squ kwara babaw cinbwanan ga qutux nqu maki lalu qu minzka nya,ru matas squ linhuyan na pitu squliq.Pinnatas nqu 湯姆遜Canada ka pintasan nya squ ryax ki qsya hminas squ mopuw kawas qu pintasan qnxan,tehuk squ kawas maki te 1917masa tmalam.taqu sinqtuxan naha mita squ linhuyan nqu mpitu ppatas hya lga maki squ 'osa na babaw nqu inlungan ru kwara ka inllungan nqu ssquliq,linhuyan qani ga maki squ 1920 kawas 5 byacing min qutux phtuw squ pinkita naha.taring squ 1950kawas qani ga,galun ni Sexu na Canada qu kilnalay kaku kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux ni squliq nqu 因努伊特 sbiq nya squ kahul binah na lpyuwng. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Canada hya' ga cyux maki' tay 60 00 N, 95 00 W na pemeco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 9,984,670 sq km (maki' tay 2ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 9,093,507 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 891,163 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 35,362,905. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 6.80% , lhlahuy hya' ga 34.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 59.10% spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Ottawa. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Charles III. mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Elizabeth II, aring ryax 6 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1952 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. lalu kkyalan Canada hya ga minkahun naha kay nqu zik na聖羅倫斯易洛魁語 Kanata一詞,imi nya ga qalang ru ini ga rhyal nqu linhuyan naha maki.Maki squ 1535 kawas,misuw qani ga nyux ki'an nqu 'tayal nqu 魁北克市nyux naha mosa rasun qu qutux kahul Kokka nqu法國pyang musa smehang kkongun na yuwaw雅克·卡蒂亞nyux naha rasun te斯塔達科納,ana yaqu rhyal qasa lga sllwan naha maha Kanata la.babaw nqu 雅克·卡蒂亞qaniy lga si'naha say maha Canada imi nya ga 多納科納(pgleng na即斯塔達科納) nyux klhang nqu rhyal.maki squ 1545 kawas,biru nqu Kokka na歐洲ru biru na rhyal kktan 'osa Kokka ga nyux naha 'ringun qu Kokka na Canada qani maha rhyal qani qu mwah rahyuw squ rhyal qani.qsu balay hga maki 17 seci ki 18 seci,sun na Canada qu 新法蘭西na llyung rhyal 聖羅倫斯.nanu saga nyux naha spgluw squ mopuw cyugal kinlhangan na squliq ki rhyal yuwaw hmtuy squ Kokka na英,Sexu na英國maki squ 1774 kawas pkita kmal squ horit na魁北克,taqu horit qani ga nyux pshgci squ kki'an nqu Canada tehok squ zmal krahu nqu languw maki squ rhyal na mkura kilux qasa,kintwahiq nqu llyang na 俄亥俄.Kwara qu rhyal qni ga maki squ 1783 kawas lga wayal naha pskura 'myuw miq squ giqas na Kokka na Amirika la,ana ga zmal nqu languw krahu nqu rhyal te mkura tltu qasa ga,mucing soni nqu 安大略 Sng ka kwara rhyal nyux qrqan nqu Kokka na英國. babaw na qnolan nqu Kokka 英國squ 法蘭西,Kokka nqu Canada lga m'sazing qu qinsugal la,qsugun maha tekraya Canada ru te kyahu Canada la.maki squ 1841kawas,taqu tekraya Canada ru te kyahu Canada lga msqum lozi ru m'Canada Sng la. maki squ 1867 kawas,Canada Sng ki 新布藍茲維ru新斯科細亞ps'rux squ sinqunan naha mlahang nanak squ Canada.gmluw squ Canada n_gyut mshriq kinlahang nqu Kokka英國,ana naha Sexu ga n_giyut gmluw maki squ biru na tthoki ru pinkyalan naha squ gaga ka skayal naha maha Canada.maki squ 1982 kawas lalu nqu smqqas squ ryax sqasan Kokka na Canada aring sun naha maha,naha nanak gmleng maras squ ryax ru wayal naha zyugum maha ryax na Canada. zuaw nqu kinraral ziraynqu ''tayal skahul squ minkingkyuw naha zyuwaw na kinraral ru pinbcywan naha mqbaq ulah nqu squliq,ana balay cikuy ga pkai qu zik na 24, 500 kawas 育空mkura tltu qasa lga rima maki qu squliq cyux myuwi kya la,squliq myuwi maki squ 安大略 mkura kilux baqun mhyuwaw mita squ zik kung yan7,500 kawas.be'nux rhyal na舊克羅ki藍魚洞穴ga snbil naha zyuwaw minnaki squ zik na Canada spyang binkesan rhyal kni'an nqu squliq.spyang baqun maha syaki nqu tayal ga maki qu rhyal b'syqan naha maki,muhi squ rrhyal,m'ubu' nqu syakay ka pinbcyuan ru wanglu na zyuwaw htgan pila.Kya kruma minnqwas na 'tayal hya ga maki squ cinhkan kinlhang na Kokka 歐洲lga zik na ptehuk squ Canada ga wayal rima mshgah la,misuw qani ga siki spwah squ kilnyuhan naha kingkyuw zyuwaw na sraral musa mita squ kilbaqan naha. maki squ tequtux nazyuwaw kinlhang Kokka na 歐洲qu squliq mnki squ Canada ga,kwara ka linpgan kihmayan nqu squliq ga wayal squ 20 mang tehuk 200 mang.gluw nqu mrhuw na Canada ka skahun squ lihoyan na sqblaq hi nqu 'tayal mita,misuw qani ga kya wayal squ 50 mang squliq minnaki rhyal nqu Canada qani.Yalaw gi ungat qu sintnaqan na squ blq ramu nya,taqu 'tayal sqani ga wahan qmyu m'atu nqu kinlhangan na squliq,bgasiq,'nbu kbakih lamu na 'nbu qmyu,wal si pskongat qu squliq nya 40% tehuk squ80%.misuw 'tayal nyux maki squ Canada qani ga tequtux nqu minruk,因努伊特人ki梅蒂人,zik qani ga 'tayal nqu梅蒂hya ga 'tayal ki kinbahan Kokka na 法 wayal 'mimaw ki Canada ru m' kinbahan na Canada la .pspngun ki binah na 'tayal ga,yalaw gi ini pyang psaywah qu squliq na努伊特ki squliq na kinlhangan Kokka na歐洲. sinnhyan horitgaga nqu Canada hya ga maki inu klhang naha zqu Zizyuw na smnhyan,ksxun naha qu lmau na gaga ru klahang qu ana ini ptnaq na sinnhyan ga Zizyuw naha. kahun squ knita naha te 2011kawas hmkangi baq squ ssquliq,Kokka na Canada ga maki 67.3% qu ssquliq smnhi squ Kiristokyo(lpgun uzi qu giqas na Kyokay,Tinskyo)maki squ smnhi Kiristokyo qani ga Tinskyo qu spyang krahu na ubuy nqu smnhi,taqu squliq smnhi squ Tinskyo ga kya waayl tehuk squ 38.7%.sinqunan linhoyan kwara nqu Kyokay Canada ga(maha ni mopuw ga mpitu qu cyoro kyokay na Canada ki binah na kyokay yannqu 衛理公會na Canada,公理會na Canada pinsqunan nqu kyokay .)maki squ rhyal qani ga spyang krahu ubuy nqu giqas kyokay,kinhmayan nqu ssquliq nya ga wal squ 6.1%,ru babaw nya lga kyokay nqu聖公Canada lga (5.0%)ki kyo kay na浸信(1.9%).ru maki qu kya wal squ 23.9％ nqu ssquliq ga ini snhi squ sinnhyan.binha na sinnhyan hya ga 伊斯蘭教(3.2%),印度教(1.7%),錫克教(1.4%),佛教(1.3%)ki猶太教(1.2%),kwara ka smnhi na ssquliq ga wal mtbuci squpin cikay. ppsbaq ppsbaq nqu Canada hya ga kahul naha squ qutux qutux na rrhyal tbuci mtyuwaw lmahang.5 kawas tehuk 7 kawas ru 16 kawas tehuk squ 18kawas qani hya ga qinhlan nqu Kokka na Canada siki mqwas squ biru kwara,ini khzi taqu baq mita squ bnrwan na ssquliq hya ga wayal squ 99％. mucing squ 2011 kawas,maki te 25kawas tehuk squ 64 kawas nqu mebnkis hayhazi hya ga kyawayal squ 88%nqu ssquliq wayal magal squ pinwasan na kawcung pinqbaq biru,pspngu squ sinqunan mtyuwaw ggwahan squ pila ki piaqunan lihuyan squ pphtuw nqu kinbaqan ga (74%)kinwagiq.2002 kawas,maki squ 25kawas tehuk squ 64 kawas na ssquliq Canada ga kya wayal squ 43% nqu ssquliq ga wayal magal squ krahu na pinqwasan biru,ana ga mki squ 25kawas tehuk squ 34 kawas na ssquliq hya ga kyawal squ 51% na ssquliq ga maki kwara qu biru pinwasan naha squ krahu na pinqwasan la. skahul naha squ Kokka kungsi pkayal te razyuw mita maha maki squ bnrwan naha te 2012 kawas,maki squ babaw cinbwanan qani ga spyang krahu qu ppsbaq ru pinwasan na Kokka Canada hya.pinhtgan Knita naha squ cipuqing Kwara ka Kokka na mqwas biru ga mqwas biru nqu Canada hya ga maki qu kinbaqan naha hminas kinwagiq nqu sinqunan mtyuwaw squ hhtgan na pila qu kinbaqan naha,hminas spyang mki squ llpgal,smsun kinmhgan zezyaw qinbaqan na,pbku llamu qinbaqan qinnxan ru kahul squ kinnita naha bbiru musa smbuci kbalay squ haylaw baqun mita nqu mqbaq na squliq. kbalay squ biru na gaga spyang kin binkgan:gagan qu Canada ru ryax krahu na Canada kinbalay naqu湯姆 'rtung abaw na qparung mkura tltu,cyux skun squ kki'an 美術Kokka na Canada, nyux ki'an cingay balay nqu minruk Kokka na Canada qani,cingay qu minruk nya ru ana naha gaga uzi lga wayal mhhuluy cikay ru cingay qu lllamu nqu gaga naha uzi,taqu lllamu nqu gaga naha qani ga nyux klmang nqu horit.maki squ qalang na 魁北克,taqu squliq na魁北克qani ga krahu balay qu kinta naha squ lalu naha nanak,ru gaga nqu魁北克ki Kokka nqu英式na gaga Canada ga maki balay qu ini btnaq.kahul squ kara nqu Kokka mwah mita ga,m'gaga nqu 馬賽克qu Canada qani——yalaw gi gaga nqu Canada qani ga minkahul squ ini ptnaq nqu rrhyal,ru sinqunan nqu squliq na tayal ka ini ptnaq nqu gaga ssquliq.taqu gaga nqu Sexu mosa glgan hya ga,yan nqu sinqunan ppkita squ ''nbu,laxan qu gaga horit maha phuqil hya,kinrrngu puyut squ mqzinut,smrrhuw qmhut lmahang squ ppatus ki ptgyah smwal squ kneril ki kneril mlikuy ki mlikuy ga nway msqum ru qutux nqu mwah kbalay squ inkyasan na gaga Canada. minnaki squ yuwaw kinraral kinlhang nqu rhyal na Kokka 英ki Kokka 法,wayal msbah cikay qu gaga na Canada gi 'mimaw cikay squ rusa Kokka ki gaga nqu 'tayal sqani.taqu kay nqu 'tayal sqani,taqu kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux ni tayal ru hngiyang lubuwn qani ga hmluy squ kinnita naha nanak squ lalu naha ka Canada.cingay squliq nqu Canada ga kinmopuw naha krahu mita squ llamu na gaga,knita naha squ llamu na gaga qani ga krangi naha qutux qbci nqu Kokka mita.zyuwaw nqu gnogan na Kokka Amirika ru sinbung ka maki squ yal Kokka na英maki squ zik na gaga Canada ga soyal naha balay,ana ga trang naha soyal uzi qu gaga nqu qeqaya Canada ki spyang maki squ kktan ta squ teribiy ru ega maki squ Amirika ki babaw cinbwanan ana inu nqu rrhyal ga soyal naha balay.ana yaqu gaga nqu kinlhangan ga soyal na Sexu na,horit ki pkayal squ kosiy na Canada,syun naha inlungan qu ega kyuk nqu Kokka na Canada ru razyuw pkayal squ yuwaw na teribi ru yal nqu kkyal nqu linhoyan wi'ing ka kwara ki'an i ppcywagu. skahul naha squ kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux ni tayal Canada kinitanaha squ kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux musa magal squ sekow spyang karahu,mi'a su nqu 湯姆·湯姆遜——hya ga maki squ kwara babaw cinbwanan ga qutux nqu maki lalu qu minzka nya,ru matas squ linhuyan na pitu squliq.Pinnatas nqu 湯姆遜Canada ka pintasan nya squ ryax ki qsya hminas squ mopuw kawas qu pintasan qnxan,tehuk squ kawas maki te 1917masa tmalam.taqu sinqtuxan naha mita squ linhuyan nqu mpitu ppatas hya lga maki squ 'osa na babaw nqu inlungan ru kwara ka inllungan nqu ssquliq,linhuyan qani ga maki squ 1920 kawas 5 byacing min qutux phtuw squ pinkita naha.taring squ 1950kawas qani ga,galun ni Sexu na Canada qu kilnalay kaku kinbaqan ka gaga qqyqnux ni squliq nqu 因努伊特 sbiq nya squ kahul binah na lpyuwng. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨana*a ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** w na pemeʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ *,***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa *,***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa *.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ottawa. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mpituʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨħarles~ɕ iii. mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa elizaβetħ ii, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. lalu kkjalan ʦ~ʨana*a ħja ɣa minkaħun naħa kaj nqu zik na******** kanata**,imi nja ɣa qalaŋ ru ini ɣa rħjal nqu linħujan naħa maki.maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ,mis~ɕuw qani ɣa njux kiʔan nqu ʔtajal nqu ****njux naħa mos~ɕa ras~ɕun qu qutux kaħul kokka nqu**pjaŋ mus~ɕa s~ɕmeħaŋ kkoŋun na juwaw******njux naħa ras~ɕun te*****,ana jaqu rħjal qas~ɕa lɣa s~ɕllwan naħa maħa kanata la.βaβaw nqu ******qanij lɣa s~ɕiʔnaħa s~ɕaj maħa ʦ~ʨana*a imi nja ɣa ****(pɣleŋ na******) njux klħaŋ nqu rħjal.maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ,βiru nqu kokka na**ru βiru na rħjal kktan ʔos~ɕa kokka ɣa njux naħa ʔriŋun qu kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a qani maħa rħjal qani qu mwaħ raħjuw s~ɕqu rħjal qani.qs~ɕu βalaj ħɣa maki ** s~ɕeʦ~ʨi ki ** s~ɕeʦ~ʨi,s~ɕun na ʦ~ʨana*a qu ****na lljuŋ rħjal ****.nanu s~ɕaɣa njux naħa s~ɕpɣluw s~ɕqu mopuw ʦ~ʨjuɣal kinlħaŋan na s~ɕquliq ki rħjal juwaw ħmtuj s~ɕqu kokka na*,s~ɕexu na**maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ pkita kmal s~ɕqu ħorit na***,taqu ħorit qani ɣa njux ps~ɕħɣʦ~ʨi s~ɕqu kkiʔan nqu ʦ~ʨana*a teħok s~ɕqu zmal kraħu nqu laŋuw maki s~ɕqu rħjal na mkura kilux qas~ɕa,kintwaħiq nqu lljaŋ na ***.kwara qu rħjal qni ɣa maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ lɣa wajal naħa ps~ɕkura ʔmjuw miq s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ na kokka na amirika la,ana ɣa zmal nqu laŋuw kraħu nqu rħjal te mkura tltu qas~ɕa ɣa,muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕoni nqu *** s~ɕŋ ka kwara rħjal njux qrqan nqu kokka na**. βaβaw na qnolan nqu kokka **s~ɕqu ***,kokka nqu ʦ~ʨana*a lɣa mʔs~ɕaziŋ qu qins~ɕuɣal la,qs~ɕuɣun maħa tekraja ʦ~ʨana*a ru te kjaħu ʦ~ʨana*a la.maki s~ɕqu ****kawas~ɕ,taqu tekraja ʦ~ʨana*a ru te kjaħu ʦ~ʨana*a lɣa ms~ɕqum lozi ru mʔʦ~ʨana*a s~ɕŋ la. maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ,ʦ~ʨana*a s~ɕŋ ki *****ru*****ps~ɕʔrux s~ɕqu s~ɕinqunan naħa mlaħaŋ nanak s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨana*a.ɣmluw s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨana*a nɣjut ms~ɕħriq kinlaħaŋ nqu kokka**,ana naħa s~ɕexu ɣa nɣijut ɣmluw maki s~ɕqu βiru na ttħoki ru pinkjalan naħa s~ɕqu ɣaɣa ka s~ɕkajal naħa maħa ʦ~ʨana*a.maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ lalu nqu s~ɕmqqas~ɕ s~ɕqu rjax s~ɕqas~ɕan kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a ariŋ s~ɕun naħa maħa,naħa nanak ɣmleŋ maras~ɕ s~ɕqu rjax ru wajal naħa zjuɣum maħa rjax na ʦ~ʨana*a. zuaw nqu kinraral zirajnqu ʔʔtajal s~ɕkaħul s~ɕqu minkiŋkjuw naħa zjuwaw na kinraral ru pinβʦ~ʨjwan naħa mqβaq ulaħ nqu s~ɕquliq,ana βalaj ʦ~ʨikuj ɣa pkai qu zik na **, *** kawas~ɕ **mkura tltu qas~ɕa lɣa rima maki qu s~ɕquliq ʦ~ʨjux mjuwi kja la,s~ɕquliq mjuwi maki s~ɕqu *** mkura kilux βaqun mħjuwaw mita s~ɕqu zik kuŋ jan*,*** kawas~ɕ.βeʔnux rħjal na***ki****ɣa s~ɕnβil naħa zjuwaw minnaki s~ɕqu zik na ʦ~ʨana*a s~ɕpjaŋ βinkes~ɕan rħjal kniʔan nqu s~ɕquliq.s~ɕpjaŋ βaqun maħa s~ɕjaki nqu tajal ɣa maki qu rħjal βʔs~ɕjqan naħa maki,muħi s~ɕqu rrħjal,mʔuβuʔ nqu s~ɕjakaj ka pinβʦ~ʨjuan ru waŋlu na zjuwaw ħtɣan pila.kja kruma minnqwas~ɕ na ʔtajal ħja ɣa maki s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨinħkan kinlħaŋ na kokka **lɣa zik na pteħuk s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa wajal rima ms~ɕħɣaħ la,mis~ɕuw qani ɣa s~ɕiki s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu kilnjuħan naħa kiŋkjuw zjuwaw na s~ɕraral mus~ɕa mita s~ɕqu kilβaqan naħa. maki s~ɕqu tequtux nazjuwaw kinlħaŋ kokka na **qu s~ɕquliq mnki s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa,kwara ka linpɣan kiħmajan nqu s~ɕquliq ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ** maŋ teħuk *** maŋ.ɣluw nqu mrħuw na ʦ~ʨana*a ka s~ɕkaħun s~ɕqu liħojan na s~ɕqβlaq ħi nqu ʔtajal mita,mis~ɕuw qani ɣa kja wajal s~ɕqu ** maŋ s~ɕquliq minnaki rħjal nqu ʦ~ʨana*a qani.jalaw ɣi uŋat qu s~ɕintnaqan na s~ɕqu βlq ramu nja,taqu ʔtajal s~ɕqani ɣa waħan qmju mʔatu nqu kinlħaŋan na s~ɕquliq,βɣas~ɕiq,ʔnβu kβakiħ lamu na ʔnβu qmju,wal s~ɕi ps~ɕkoŋat qu s~ɕquliq nja **% teħuk s~ɕqu**%.mis~ɕuw ʔtajal njux maki s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨana*a qani ɣa tequtux nqu minruk,*****ki***,zik qani ɣa ʔtajal nqu**ħja ɣa ʔtajal ki kinβaħan kokka na * wajal ʔmimaw ki ʦ~ʨana*a ru mʔ kinβaħan na ʦ~ʨana*a la .ps~ɕpŋun ki βinaħ na ʔtajal ɣa,jalaw ɣi ini pjaŋ ps~ɕajwaħ qu s~ɕquliq na***ki s~ɕquliq na kinlħaŋan kokka na**. s~ɕinnħjan ħoritɣaɣa nqu ʦ~ʨana*a ħja ɣa maki inu klħaŋ naħa zqu zizjuw na s~ɕmnħjan,ks~ɕxun naħa qu lmau na ɣaɣa ru klaħaŋ qu ana ini ptnaq na s~ɕinnħjan ɣa zizjuw naħa. kaħun s~ɕqu knita naħa te ****kawas~ɕ ħmkaŋi βaq s~ɕqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq,kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa maki **.*% qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq s~ɕmnħi s~ɕqu kiris~ɕtokjo(lpɣun uzi qu ɣiqas~ɕ na kjokaj,tins~ɕkjo)maki s~ɕqu s~ɕmnħi kiris~ɕtokjo qani ɣa tins~ɕkjo qu s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu na uβuj nqu s~ɕmnħi,taqu s~ɕquliq s~ɕmnħi s~ɕqu tins~ɕkjo ɣa kja waajl teħuk s~ɕqu **.*%.s~ɕinqunan linħojan kwara nqu kjokaj ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa(maħa ni mopuw ɣa mpitu qu ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj na ʦ~ʨana*a ki βinaħ na kjokaj jannqu ****na ʦ~ʨana*a,***na ʦ~ʨana*a pins~ɕqunan nqu kjokaj .)maki s~ɕqu rħjal qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu uβuj nqu ɣiqas~ɕ kjokaj,kinħmajan nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq nja ɣa wal s~ɕqu *.*%,ru βaβaw nja lɣa kjokaj nqu**ʦ~ʨana*a lɣa (*.*%)ki kjo kaj na**(*.*%).ru maki qu kja wal s~ɕqu **.** nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa ini s~ɕnħi s~ɕqu s~ɕinnħjan.βinħa na s~ɕinnħjan ħja ɣa ****(*.*%),***(*.*%),***(*.*%),**(*.*%)ki***(*.*%),kwara ka s~ɕmnħi na s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa wal mtβuʦ~ʨi s~ɕqupin ʦ~ʨikaj. pps~ɕβaq pps~ɕβaq nqu ʦ~ʨana*a ħja ɣa kaħul naħa s~ɕqu qutux qutux na rrħjal tβuʦ~ʨi mtjuwaw lmaħaŋ.* kawas~ɕ teħuk * kawas~ɕ ru ** kawas~ɕ teħuk s~ɕqu **kawas~ɕ qani ħja ɣa qinħlan nqu kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a s~ɕiki mqwas~ɕ s~ɕqu βiru kwara,ini kħzi taqu βaq mita s~ɕqu βnrwan na s~ɕs~ɕquliq ħja ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ***. muʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ,maki te **kawas~ɕ teħuk s~ɕqu ** kawas~ɕ nqu meβnkis~ɕ ħajħazi ħja ɣa kjawajal s~ɕqu **%nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq wajal maɣal s~ɕqu pinwas~ɕan na kawʦ~ʨuŋ pinqβaq βiru,ps~ɕpŋu s~ɕqu s~ɕinqunan mtjuwaw ɣɣwaħan s~ɕqu pila ki piaqunan liħujan s~ɕqu ppħtuw nqu kinβaqan ɣa (**%)kinwaɣiq.**** kawas~ɕ,maki s~ɕqu **kawas~ɕ teħuk s~ɕqu ** kawas~ɕ na s~ɕs~ɕquliq ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa kja wajal s~ɕqu **% nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa wajal maɣal s~ɕqu kraħu na pinqwas~ɕan βiru,ana ɣa mki s~ɕqu **kawas~ɕ teħuk s~ɕqu ** kawas~ɕ na s~ɕs~ɕquliq ħja ɣa kjawal s~ɕqu **% na s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa maki kwara qu βiru pinwas~ɕan naħa s~ɕqu kraħu na pinqwas~ɕan la. s~ɕkaħul naħa s~ɕqu kokka kuŋs~ɕi pkajal te razjuw mita maħa maki s~ɕqu βnrwan naħa te **** kawas~ɕ,maki s~ɕqu βaβaw ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu qu pps~ɕβaq ru pinwas~ɕan na kokka ʦ~ʨana*a ħja.pinħtɣan knita naħa s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨipuqiŋ kwara ka kokka na mqwas~ɕ βiru ɣa mqwas~ɕ βiru nqu ʦ~ʨana*a ħja ɣa maki qu kinβaqan naħa ħminas~ɕ kinwaɣiq nqu s~ɕinqunan mtjuwaw s~ɕqu ħħtɣan na pila qu kinβaqan naħa,ħminas~ɕ s~ɕpjaŋ mki s~ɕqu llpɣal,s~ɕms~ɕun kinmħɣan zezjaw qinβaqan na,pβku llamu qinβaqan qinnxan ru kaħul s~ɕqu kinnita naħa ββiru mus~ɕa s~ɕmβuʦ~ʨi kβalaj s~ɕqu ħajlaw βaqun mita nqu mqβaq na s~ɕquliq. kβalaj s~ɕqu βiru na ɣaɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kin βinkɣan:ɣaɣan qu ʦ~ʨana*a ru rjax kraħu na ʦ~ʨana*a kinβalaj naqu** ʔrtuŋ aβaw na qparuŋ mkura tltu,ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕkun s~ɕqu kkiʔan **kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a, njux kiʔan ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj nqu minruk kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a qani,ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu minruk nja ru ana naħa ɣaɣa uzi lɣa wajal mħħuluj ʦ~ʨikaj ru ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu lllamu nqu ɣaɣa naħa uzi,taqu lllamu nqu ɣaɣa naħa qani ɣa njux klmaŋ nqu ħorit.maki s~ɕqu qalaŋ na ***,taqu s~ɕquliq na***qani ɣa kraħu βalaj qu kinta naħa s~ɕqu lalu naħa nanak,ru ɣaɣa nqu***ki kokka nqu**na ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa maki βalaj qu ini βtnaq.kaħul s~ɕqu kara nqu kokka mwaħ mita ɣa,mʔɣaɣa nqu ***qu ʦ~ʨana*a qani**jalaw ɣi ɣaɣa nqu ʦ~ʨana*a qani ɣa minkaħul s~ɕqu ini ptnaq nqu rrħjal,ru s~ɕinqunan nqu s~ɕquliq na tajal ka ini ptnaq nqu ɣaɣa s~ɕs~ɕquliq.taqu ɣaɣa nqu s~ɕexu mos~ɕa ɣlɣan ħja ɣa,jan nqu s~ɕinqunan ppkita s~ɕqu ʔʔnβu,laxan qu ɣaɣa ħorit maħa pħuqil ħja,kinrrŋu pujut s~ɕqu mqzinut,s~ɕmrrħuw qmħut lmaħaŋ s~ɕqu ppatus~ɕ ki ptɣjaħ s~ɕmwal s~ɕqu kneril ki kneril mlikuj ki mlikuj ɣa nwaj ms~ɕqum ru qutux nqu mwaħ kβalaj s~ɕqu inkjas~ɕan na ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨana*a. minnaki s~ɕqu juwaw kinraral kinlħaŋ nqu rħjal na kokka *ki kokka *,wajal ms~ɕβaħ ʦ~ʨikaj qu ɣaɣa na ʦ~ʨana*a ɣi ʔmimaw ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕqu rus~ɕa kokka ki ɣaɣa nqu ʔtajal s~ɕqani.taqu kaj nqu ʔtajal s~ɕqani,taqu kinβaqan ka ɣaɣa qqjqnux ni tajal ru ħŋijaŋ luβuwn qani ɣa ħmluj s~ɕqu kinnita naħa nanak s~ɕqu lalu naħa ka ʦ~ʨana*a.ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq nqu ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa kinmopuw naħa kraħu mita s~ɕqu llamu na ɣaɣa,knita naħa s~ɕqu llamu na ɣaɣa qani ɣa kraŋi naħa qutux qβʦ~ʨi nqu kokka mita.zjuwaw nqu ɣnoɣan na kokka amirika ru s~ɕinβuŋ ka maki s~ɕqu jal kokka na*maki s~ɕqu zik na ɣaɣa ʦ~ʨana*a ɣa s~ɕojal naħa βalaj,ana ɣa traŋ naħa s~ɕojal uzi qu ɣaɣa nqu qeqaja ʦ~ʨana*a ki s~ɕpjaŋ maki s~ɕqu kktan ta s~ɕqu teriβij ru eɣa maki s~ɕqu amirika ki βaβaw ʦ~ʨinβwanan ana inu nqu rrħjal ɣa s~ɕojal naħa βalaj.ana jaqu ɣaɣa nqu kinlħaŋan ɣa s~ɕojal na s~ɕexu na,ħorit ki pkajal s~ɕqu kos~ɕij na ʦ~ʨana*a,s~ɕjun naħa inluŋan qu eɣa kjuk nqu kokka na ʦ~ʨana*a ru razjuw pkajal s~ɕqu juwaw na teriβi ru jal nqu kkjal nqu linħojan wiʔiŋ ka kwara kiʔan i ppʦ~ʨjwaɣu. s~ɕkaħul naħa s~ɕqu kinβaqan ka ɣaɣa qqjqnux ni tajal ʦ~ʨana*a kinitanaħa s~ɕqu kinβaqan ka ɣaɣa qqjqnux mus~ɕa maɣal s~ɕqu s~ɕekow s~ɕpjaŋ karaħu,miʔa s~ɕu nqu ********ħja ɣa maki s~ɕqu kwara βaβaw ʦ~ʨinβwanan ɣa qutux nqu maki lalu qu minzka nja,ru matas~ɕ s~ɕqu linħujan na pitu s~ɕquliq.pinnatas~ɕ nqu ***ʦ~ʨana*a ka pintas~ɕan nja s~ɕqu rjax ki qs~ɕja ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu mopuw kawas~ɕ qu pintas~ɕan qnxan,teħuk s~ɕqu kawas~ɕ maki te ****mas~ɕa tmalam.taqu s~ɕinqtuxan naħa mita s~ɕqu linħujan nqu mpitu ppatas~ɕ ħja lɣa maki s~ɕqu ʔos~ɕa na βaβaw nqu inluŋan ru kwara ka inlluŋan nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq,linħujan qani ɣa maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ min qutux pħtuw s~ɕqu pinkita naħa.tariŋ s~ɕqu ****kawas~ɕ qani ɣa,ɣalun ni s~ɕexu na ʦ~ʨana*a qu kilnalaj kaku kinβaqan ka ɣaɣa qqjqnux ni s~ɕquliq nqu **** s~ɕβiq nja s~ɕqu kaħul βinaħ na lpjuwŋ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
